criteriaCoverage.evidence: rls-isolation (5 tests, real PG, non-BYPASSRLS): reads only WS-A, UPDATE WS-B rowCount=0, WITH CHECK blocks WS-B write, guard asserts rolbypassrls=false. service-role-scoping proves scopedQuery isolates in-code on bypass conn; scopedQuery mandatorily prepends workspace_id=$1, throws on falsy.
per-workspace-uniqueness (real PG): same external_id across 2 ws OK; duplicate within 1 ws rejected. UNIQUE(workspace_id,external_id).
role-capability-matrix exhaustive §3A 4 roles x 5 caps; route-role-enforcement uses authorizer-injected context (not body), 403 on denial.
admin-audit (real PG): cross-tenant entry persisted; admin_audit_log platform-only (workspace user count=0, platform-admin count=1). FORCE RLS + platform_only policy.
workspace-switch-rescope (real PG): flipping claim yields a-only/b-only no bleed; authorize denies non-membership workspace claim.

recommendations: ensureTestAppRole interpolates a hardcoded role constant into DDL; safe today, format(%I) would harden.
Assert SQLSTATE 23505 in AC2 rather than message regex for locale/version resilience.
Add CI guard running DB-integration tier with >=3 cold turbo runs to catch any reintroduction of caching.
